_comment: 每周填写此文件，然后运行 sender.py 发送 newsletter。字段说明见下方。

strategy_pulse.zh: 本周美股遭遇「伊朗战争+通胀+衰退」三重暴击，道指单日暴跌793点正式进入修正区间，S&P 500连跌五周创四年纪录。StockQueen V5 的 BEAR regime 防御体系在周初已自动激活——组合配置防御性标的（EQNR +5.3%、ERAS +10.0%）和反向ETF，持仓加权平均收益 +3.7%，在大盘暴跌中逆势产生正向 Alpha。六层防御机制（50%现金保护 + 反向ETF对冲 + ATR止损收紧 + 最低评分门槛提高 + VIX降杠杆 + MR自动停用）完全按代码纪律执行，无人工干预。
strategy_pulse.en: Markets endured a triple shock this week — Iran war escalation, rising inflation, and recession fears — with the Dow plunging 793 points into correction territory and the S&P 500 posting its longest losing streak in four years. StockQueen V5’s BEAR regime defense activated automatically at the start of the week. The portfolio held defensive names (EQNR +5.3%, ERAS +10.0%) and inverse ETFs, delivering a weighted average return of +3.7% while the broader market sold off. All six defense layers — 50% cash buffer, inverse ETF hedging, tightened ATR stops, elevated score thresholds, VIX de-leveraging, and MR auto-shutdown — executed as coded, with zero manual intervention.

quant_insight.title_zh: 暴跌时你的量化模型在做什么？——Regime Detection 的三个关键信号
quant_insight.title_en: What Does Your Quant Model Do When Markets Crash? — Three Key Regime Detection Signals
quant_insight.body_zh:
当道指一天暴跌793点，散户的第一反应是恐慌抛售或死扛不动。但量化系统不会恐慌——它只看数据。StockQueen V5 的 Regime Detection 模型在暴跌发生前就已切换至 BEAR 模式，关键在于三个先行信号的共振：

1. SPY 跌破 MA50 且 MA20 < MA50——这是最经典的趋势破位信号。当短期均线下穿长期均线，说明下行动量已从「噪音」变成「趋势」。本轮下跌中，SPY 在3月中旬就已跌破 MA50，模型随即开始收缩仓位。

2. VIX 突破阈值（>25）——VIX 从2月的15飙升至本周的30+。当恐慌指数突破25，历史数据显示市场在未来4周内继续下跌的概率超过65%。我们的模型在VIX突破25时自动触发「降杠杆」：将持仓从满仓缩减至50%，多出的资金转入现金或国债ETF。

3. 信贷利差扩大 + 油价飙升的双重确认——单一信号可能是噪音，但当布伦特原油突破$108/桶、高收益债利差同步扩大时，这意味着市场正在为「真实经济冲击」定价，而非简单的情绪波动。伊朗战争升级正是这种双重确认的典型案例。

这三个信号的共振使模型确信度从「观望」升级为「防御」。结果：在道指进入修正的同一周，StockQueen 组合的持仓平均收益为+3.7%，同期SPY -1.67%。这不是运气，这是系统纪律在极端市况下的直接体现。

Walk-Forward 验证显示，在过去6年的所有 BEAR regime 窗口中，防御机制的平均 Sharpe 为 1.31，胜率 57.7%。最严酷的2022年全年熊市，组合仅亏损1.3%，同期SPY -18.1%。
quant_insight.body_en:
When the Dow drops 793 points in a single day, retail investors either panic-sell or freeze. A quantitative system does neither — it reads data. StockQueen V5’s Regime Detection model switched to BEAR mode before the crash, driven by the convergence of three leading signals:

1. SPY below MA50 with MA20 < MA50 — The classic trend breakdown signal. When the short-term moving average crosses below the long-term, downside momentum has shifted from noise to trend. SPY broke below MA50 in mid-March; the model began reducing exposure immediately.

2. VIX breach (>25) — VIX surged from 15 in February to 30+ this week. When the fear index crosses 25, historical data shows a >65% probability of continued decline over the next 4 weeks. Our model auto-triggers de-leveraging at VIX 25: cutting positions to 50% and parking excess capital in cash or treasury ETFs.

3. Credit spread widening + oil spike double confirmation — A single signal can be noise. But when Brent crude breaks $108/barrel and high-yield credit spreads widen simultaneously, the market is pricing in a real economic shock, not just sentiment fluctuation. The Iran war escalation is a textbook case of this double confirmation.

The convergence of all three signals elevated model conviction from 'watch' to 'defend.' Result: in the same week the Dow entered correction, StockQueen’s portfolio averaged +3.7% while SPY fell -1.67%. This isn’t luck — it’s systematic discipline expressed in extreme conditions.

Walk-Forward validation shows an average Sharpe of 1.31 and 57.7% win rate across all BEAR regime windows over the past 6 years. In the harshest test — the full-year 2022 bear market — the portfolio lost only 1.3% while SPY dropped -18.1%.

strategy_notes.zh: 本周模型无参数调整。Regime 维持 BEAR 模式，防御体系全面激活。AV 数据源本周出现短暂故障，系统已自动从 regime_history 安全降级，未硬编码 bull（commit e4822be）。Walk-Forward 全策略组合 Sharpe 维持在 4.23。
strategy_notes.en: No parameter changes this week. Regime remains in BEAR mode with full defense activation. Alpha Vantage experienced a brief outage; the system gracefully degraded from regime_history instead of hardcoding bull (commit e4822be). Walk-Forward full portfolio Sharpe remains at 4.23.

blog_feature.title_zh: 道指暴跌793点进入修正：StockQueen六层防御体系如何逆势守住收益
blog_feature.title_en: Dow Crashes 793 Points Into Correction: How StockQueen’s Six-Layer Defense Held the Line
blog_feature.summary_zh: 2026年3月最后一周，美股遭遇伊朗战争+通胀+衰退三重暴击。S&P 500连跌五周，CNN恐惧指数触及极端恐惧。这篇文章详细解析了 StockQueen V5 的六层防御体系如何在暴跌中自动激活、保护资本并产生正向Alpha。
blog_feature.summary_en: In the final week of March 2026, markets faced a triple shock — Iran war, inflation, and recession fears. The S&P 500 fell for five consecutive weeks as CNN’s Fear & Greed Index hit 'Extreme Fear.' This post breaks down exactly how StockQueen V5’s six-layer defense system automatically activated to protect capital and generate positive alpha.

product_news.title_zh: 数据基础设施升级：Massive API 统一数据源上线
product_news.title_en: Infrastructure Upgrade: Massive API Unified Data Source Now Live
product_news.body_zh: 三项生产环境更新：(1) Massive API 统一数据源上线——行情、技术指标、基本面数据全部迁移至 Massive（Polygon.io 兼容协议），替换原有 Alpha Vantage + FMP 双源架构。Massive 无速率限制，并发评分从原来的逐个请求提升至 30 路并发，选股池1,688只的全量评分从数分钟缩短至秒级完成。(2) AV 故障安全降级——数据源故障时系统自动从 regime_history 推断市场状态，不再硬编码 bull，避免熊市误判（commit e4822be）。(3) 六层防御体系实战验证——道指暴跌793点的实战中首次完整验证，组合在大盘修正中实现正向收益。
product_news.body_en: Three production updates: (1) Massive API unified data source is live — market data, technical indicators, and fundamentals have all migrated to Massive (Polygon.io-compatible protocol), replacing the legacy Alpha Vantage + FMP dual-source architecture. Massive has no rate limits, boosting concurrent scoring from sequential requests to 30 parallel workers. Full scoring across all 1,688 tickers now completes in seconds instead of minutes. (2) AV failsafe degradation — when data sources go down, the system now infers regime from regime_history instead of hardcoding bull, preventing dangerous misclassification during bear markets (commit e4822be). (3) Six-layer defense battle-tested — the full defense system was validated in production during the Dow’s 793-point crash, with the portfolio generating positive returns during the correction.

next_week_outlook.zh:
关键关注：4月第一周（3月31日-4月4日）是关税政策落地的关键时间窗口。特朗普「对等关税」计划预计4月2日生效，市场已提前定价部分冲击，但实际执行细节仍是最大不确定性来源。

Regime 预判：模型维持 BEAR 模式不变。VIX 仍处于30+高位，SPY远在MA50下方，三重确认信号均未出现反转迹象。短期内，伊朗局势发展+关税实际落地将是驱动市场的两大核心变量。

策略执行计划：防御配置维持不变（50%现金+反向ETF对冲）；ATR止损保持收紧状态，应对高波动环境；密切监控VIX和油价——若VIX回落至20以下且油价趋稳，模型将重新评估 regime 切换；均值回归策略（MR）在BEAR模式下保持停用，避免「接飞刀」。

关键风险：若4月2日关税超预期（范围更广或税率更高），市场可能出现第二波下杀。反之，若关税力度弱于预期或出现谈判缓和信号，可能触发超跌反弹。无论哪种情况，系统都会按信号自动调整，不做主观判断。
next_week_outlook.en:
Key Watch: The first week of April (March 31 - April 4) is a critical window as Trump’s 'reciprocal tariffs' are expected to take effect on April 2nd. Markets have partially priced in the impact, but execution details remain the largest source of uncertainty.

Regime Forecast: Model stays in BEAR mode. VIX remains above 30, SPY is well below MA50, and none of the three confirmation signals show reversal. Near-term, Iran developments + actual tariff implementation are the two key market drivers.

Execution Plan: Defensive allocation unchanged (50% cash + inverse ETF hedge); ATR stops remain tightened for high-volatility conditions; closely monitoring VIX and oil — if VIX drops below 20 and oil stabilizes, model will reassess regime switch; Mean Reversion (MR) stays disabled in BEAR mode to avoid catching falling knives.

Key Risk: If April 2nd tariffs exceed expectations (broader scope or higher rates), a second leg down is possible. Conversely, softer-than-expected tariffs or negotiation signals could trigger an oversold bounce. Either way, the system adjusts automatically based on signals — no subjective calls.
